sheets.prompt:
Create one complete production contact sheet for "乙女修仙塔罗", 4 columns by 3 rows, containing 12 separate mini tarot artworks.
Each cell is one independent small card illustration. Keep the grid strict, evenly spaced, and easy to crop later.
Art direction: Japanese otome fantasy tarot card style, dreamy shoujo-inspired illustration, elegant female xianxia cultivators, soft Taoist magic, floating talismans, moonlit immortal gardens, delicate ancient Chinese fantasy architecture, celestial flowers, luminous ribbons, refined romantic fantasy, cinematic soft lighting.
Character rule: All human figures must be elegant ethereal female xianxia cultivators with flowing robes, subtle immortal aura, original hair ornaments, soft otome fantasy beauty, and no male-presenting characters.
Palette system: pearl ivory, sakura pink, lavender mist, moonlight blue, jade green, champagne gold, soft cyan, warm blush, subtle ink gray.
Every cell should feel like the same deck and same world, with soft otome fantasy, immortal cultivation, gentle Taoist magic, floating talismans, moonlit gardens, celestial flowers, luminous ribbons, delicate architecture, and romantic fantasy lighting.
No text, no titles, no card names, no numbers, no borders inside the card art, no watermark, no logo.
Do not copy any Rider-Waite-Smith, Thoth, Modern Witch, Wild Unknown, or Light Seer's composition; inherit only abstract tarot meanings.
Cards by grid cell:
row 1, column 1: The Fool (愚者) - 年轻修士站在悬浮山门边缘，脚下是发光云海，身旁漂浮一枚未激活的玉符
row 1, column 2: The Magician (魔术师) - 术士在霓虹法坛前将符箓、剑、杯、币四种法器连入星图阵列
row 1, column 3: The High Priestess (女祭司) - 银发女祭司坐在量子藏经阁门前，身后两根黑白数据玉柱缓慢发光
row 1, column 4: The Empress (女皇) - 仙庭女主在机械灵田中抚育发光灵植，远处古楼与生态舱交错
row 2, column 1: The Emperor (皇帝) - 玄甲帝君坐在悬浮龙椅上，背后是环形星城和律令符文
row 2, column 2: The Hierophant (教皇) - 宗门导师在全息道观内授箓，弟子们围绕光阵静坐
row 2, column 3: The Lovers (恋人) - 两位修行者在双生飞桥上交换发光心印，天际有阴阳星核
row 2, column 4: The Chariot (战车) - 修士驾驶青铜机甲战车穿过霓虹云路，两侧灵兽无人机拉开阵势
row 3, column 1: Strength (力量) - 女武修以手心金光安抚机械白虎，背景是静默雷池
row 3, column 2: The Hermit (隐者) - 老修士提着量子灵灯行走在雪山天梯，脚下电路像星河
row 3, column 3: Wheel of Fortune (命运之轮) - 巨大的因果齿轮悬在云端，符箓和星轨绕轮旋转
row 3, column 4: Justice (正义) - 执法仙官手持光剑与玉衡，脚下是镜面审判法阵
Negative prompt: no text, no title, no border, no number, no watermark, no logo, no copied Rider-Waite-Smith composition, no copied Thoth, Modern Witch, Wild Unknown or Light Seer's imagery, no low resolution, no blurry face, no extra fingers, no western medieval costume, no random typography, no harsh cyberpunk, no gritty sci-fi machinery, no dark dystopian armor

Create one complete production contact sheet for "乙女修仙塔罗", 4 columns by 3 rows, containing 12 separate mini tarot artworks.
Each cell is one independent small card illustration. Keep the grid strict, evenly spaced, and easy to crop later.
Art direction: Japanese otome fantasy tarot card style, dreamy shoujo-inspired illustration, elegant female xianxia cultivators, soft Taoist magic, floating talismans, moonlit immortal gardens, delicate ancient Chinese fantasy architecture, celestial flowers, luminous ribbons, refined romantic fantasy, cinematic soft lighting.
Character rule: All human figures must be elegant ethereal female xianxia cultivators with flowing robes, subtle immortal aura, original hair ornaments, soft otome fantasy beauty, and no male-presenting characters.

Do not copy any Rider-Waite-Smith, Thoth, Modern Witch, Wild Unknown, or Light Seer's composition; inherit only abstract tarot meanings.
Cards by grid cell:
row 1, column 1: The Hanged Man (倒吊人) - 修士倒悬于反重力桃树下，眉心亮起新的星图视角
row 1, column 2: Death (死神) - 黑袍灵械使穿过废弃仙城，枯木枝头长出霓虹新芽
row 1, column 3: Temperance (节制) - 炼丹师在两只悬浮玉盏间调和金蓝灵液，身后水火双阵相融
row 1, column 4: The Devil (恶魔) - 霓虹魔市里巨大的欲望算法化作妖影，两名修士被发光契约线牵住
row 2, column 1: The Tower (高塔) - 通天数据塔被雷符击裂，瓦片与服务器碎片在空中飞散
row 2, column 2: The Star (星星) - 少女在天河观星台倾倒星砂，远处机械莲花盛开
row 2, column 3: The Moon (月亮) - 两座月门倒映在灵潮中，机械狐影和纸鹤穿过雾色光路
row 2, column 4: The Sun (太阳) - 金色日轮照耀云上仙城，孩童修士骑着光翼麒麟掠过庭院
row 3, column 1: Judgement (审判) - 天穹传来星舰法螺声，沉睡修士从莲形休眠舱中醒来
row 3, column 2: The World (世界) - 修士立于环形宇宙法阵中央，四象机械神兽环绕守护
row 3, column 3: Ace of Wands (符杖一) - single sacred object floating above an altar, vast negative space; focus on glowing wooden staff, thunder talismans, ember qi; express seed, pure potential, first spark through action, willpower, ignition, cultivation breakthrough
row 3, column 4: Two of Wands (符杖二) - two mirrored objects held in tension by a young cultivator; focus on glowing wooden staff, thunder talismans, ember qi; express choice, balance, first coordination through action, willpower, ignition, cultivation breakthrough
Negative prompt: no text, no title, no border, no number, no watermark, no logo, no copied Rider-Waite-Smith composition, no copied Thoth, Modern Witch, Wild Unknown or Light Seer's imagery, no low resolution, no blurry face, no extra fingers, no western medieval costume, no random typography, no harsh cyberpunk, no gritty sci-fi machinery, no dark dystopian armor
